title: pelargonium × modestum
intro: Pelargonium × modestum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant within the Geraniaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Rose Geranium is often used in teas, essential oils, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
